name: Central Courtyard
intent: Use a planted void in the middle of a deep house to divide public and private zones.
circulationRules: circulate along one edge of the courtyard
keep wet core adjacent to the void

name: Front Courtyard
intent: Create a shaded arrival garden before the main living room.
circulationRules: avoid direct view from street to dining

name: Side Courtyard
intent: Place a slim green void beside the stair and living spaces for cross ventilation.
circulationRules: keep rooms opening to the side void
use sliding screens along the garden edge

name: L-Shaped Layout
intent: Wrap rooms around a protected garden corner.
circulationRules: keep bedrooms away from service yard

name: U-Shaped Layout
intent: Form a family courtyard protected by three building wings.
circulationRules: use deep roof overhangs around veranda

name: Double Loaded Corridor
intent: Use a compact corridor for dense multi-room programs when the site is wide enough.
circulationRules: terminate corridor with window or courtyard

name: Multi Generation Cluster
intent: Cluster independent suites around shared family spaces.
circulationRules: provide short accessible route to elderly suite
